moments.title: Sir Paul McCartney turns 84
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles and Wings co-frontman, Sir Paul McCartney, celebrates his 84th birthday today, June 18th.

angles.name: Fab at 84
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! Still making magic. What's your favourite Macca track?

angles.name: Beatles & Beyond
angles.copy: From The Beatles to Wings and his incredible solo career, Paul McCartney turns 84 today! What's his most iconic song for you?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage matches are in full swing across the USA, Canada, and Mexico, with daily fixtures.

angles.name: Daily Football Fix
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 group stages are delivering daily drama! Who are you backing to make it through to the knockouts? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: England Match Approaching
angles.copy: Big week for England fans! The Three Lions face Panama on June 27th in the World Cup group stages. Are you ready? #EnglandFootball

moments.title: Love Island UK Series 13 Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK's 13th series, hosted by Maya Jama, is well underway on ITV2 and ITVX, with new islanders and drama unfolding daily.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up! Who's giving you the most drama this week? Catch up on ITV2 & ITVX. #LoveIslandUK

angles.name: Daily Catch Up
angles.copy: Got a text! Love Island 2026 is providing all the summer feels. What's been your favourite moment from the villa so far? #LoveIsland2026

moments.title: Summer Solstice 2026
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day Approaching
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! The Summer Solstice arrives this Sunday, June 21st. How will you be enjoying the extra daylight?

angles.name: Solstice Sunrise
angles.copy: Thousands will gather at Stonehenge and other ancient sites for the Summer Solstice sunrise this Sunday. What a moment to welcome astronomical summer! #LongestDay

moments.title: Lana Del Rey turns 41
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic, cinematic style, celebrates her 41st birthday on June 21st.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lana
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your go-to track from her iconic catalogue?

angles.name: Cinematic Sound
angles.copy: From 'Video Games' to 'Born to Die', Lana Del Rey brings a unique cinematic sound. Celebrating her 41st birthday on June 21st! #LanaDelReyBirthday

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: She's so unusual! Happy 73rd Birthday to the legendary Cyndi Lauper this Monday! What's your favourite of her anthems? #CyndiLauper

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: From her vibrant style to her powerful voice, Cyndi Lauper turns 73 on June 22nd. Celebrate her incredible career with us! #PopIcon

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Qualifying Starts
moments.blurb: The qualifying rounds for Wimbledon 2026 begin on Monday, June 22nd, ahead of the main tournament starting on June 29th.

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The grass courts are calling! Wimbledon 2026 qualifying starts Monday, June 22nd. Who are you hoping to see make it to the main draw? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Tennis Excitement
angles.copy: The build-up to Wimbledon 2026 is officially here! Qualifying matches kick off on Monday. Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis. #GrandSlam

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ari
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande this Wednesday! What's your favourite track from the pop queen?

angles.name: Pop Powerhouse
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to dominating the global music charts, Ariana Grande turns 33 on June 26th. Which of her hits gets you moving? #PopMusic

moments.title: Latest UK Official Singles Chart

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Who's ruling the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Tune in to find out the biggest tracks in the country right now! #OfficialCharts

angles.name: New Entries
angles.copy: Any new entries making a splash on the UK Official Singles Chart? What are you hoping to see climb the rankings? #NewMusic

moments.title: The Agency Season 2 Premieres
moments.blurb: The second season of the political thriller 'The Agency', starring Michael Fassbender, premieres on Paramount+ on June 21st.

angles.name: Espionage Thriller
angles.copy: Michael Fassbender is back! 'The Agency' Season 2 drops this Sunday on Paramount+. Ready for more high-stakes espionage drama? #TheAgency

angles.name: New Season Alert
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge-watch? 'The Agency' returns for its second season on June 21st. What are your predictions for the new series? #TVSeries
